sections.paragraph: (denom. from עֶלֶם, עַלְמָה of the form זְקֻנִים, בְּתוּלִים), m. pl. youth, juvenile age, Psa 89:46 Job 33:25 poet. used of juvenile strength. Job 20:11, עַצְמֹותָיו מָֽלְאוּ עֲלוּמָיו “(although) his bones are full of juvenile strength,” as well rendered by the LXX., Chald., Syriac (others take it as hidden sins). Used of the youthful period of a people, Isa 54:4.
